name: Rippling
tagline: Unified HR, IT, and finance platform with powerful AI automation
description: Rippling is an all-in-one workforce management platform that combines HR, IT, and finance into a single system. Its AI capabilities automate onboarding workflows, payroll processing, benefits administration, and compliance tracking. Rippling's intelligent engine connects every employee system—from payroll to device management—eliminating manual data entry and reducing errors across the entire employee lifecycle.
cons: Pricing can add up with modules
Some advanced features require premium tiers
